seo.title: Kmacho Technology | Engineering & Technology Strategy
seo.description: Enterprise-grade engineering and strategy for mid-market companies that need real execution without big consulting overhead.

hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade engineering and technology strategy for companies that need real execution, clear ownership, and outcomes that hold in production.

gap.body1: Enterprise consultancies move slow, cost more, and put junior teams on your project while the seniors pitch the next client. Freelancers are fast and affordable - but they do not think in systems, do not own the outcome, and disappear after delivery.
gap.body2: Mid-market companies are stuck in the middle. They need enterprise-level thinking with startup-level execution. That is exactly what we do.
gap.tagline: Enterprise capability. Without the enterprise overhead.

services.title: Senior execution across the four capabilities that move your operation.

closing.headlineStrong: From strategy to production, delivered by one senior team.
closing.headlineSoft: Faster decisions, cleaner delivery, and outcomes that hold in production.
closing.meta: Senior team • Base rate $120/hr • Miami, FL

innovation.title: Tech & Innovation
innovation.body: Custom software, AI systems, and scalable architecture for real operations. Built for production, not pitch decks.

experience.title: Experience & Design
experience.body: Interfaces, websites, and UX built to earn trust fast and convert clearly. Design here is operational leverage.

consulting.title: Strategy & Consulting
consulting.body: Roadmap, advisory, and technical direction tied to business priorities. Strategy and execution stay in one team.

growth.title: Product Growth
growth.body: Conversion, retention, and lifecycle improvements shipped in iterations. We optimize for measurable growth, not vanity metrics.

proof.title: Real projects with operational outcomes.
proof.subtitle: A SaaS partner should show execution before asking for trust. These are the transformations already delivered by Kmacho.

sunfire.title: From operational friction to daily lead capture.
sunfire.body: We rebuilt core touchpoints and automated intake to reduce manual work and speed up lead response across the sales pipeline.
sunfire.impact: Impact observed: faster lead routing and lower operational overhead.

wtc.title: Continuous online sales in a high-pressure event cycle.
wtc.body: We stabilized payment and checkout infrastructure to support recurring demand peaks without degrading customer experience.
wtc.impact: Impact observed: more resilient sales flow during critical event windows.

primeshell.title: IT continuity with strategic support that stays.
primeshell.body: We implemented a proactive support and governance model that aligned technical decisions with business continuity goals.
primeshell.impact: Impact observed: improved continuity and fewer reactive incidents.

process.title: Every phase has an objective, a deliverable, and an exit criteria.
process.subtitle: No black boxes. No surprises. You know exactly what is happening, why it is happening, and when it ends.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.body: We learn your operation before proposing a solution. Free. No strings.
discovery.note: We have never charged for discovery.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.body: Scope, timeline, and budget in writing. You decide before we start.
proposal.note: Every proposal includes milestones and risk flags.

build.title: Phased Build
build.body: Delivery in phases with sign-off at each milestone.
build.note: You always have a working version in progress.

qa.title: QA & Testing
qa.body: Nothing goes live without structured QA and validation.
qa.note: Every release has a quality gate.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Code, accounts, credentials and docs. Full ownership transfer.
delivery.note: Your team keeps full control from day one.

support.title: Support
support.body: Ongoing support through monthly retainer or on-demand model.
support.note: Relationship does not end at launch.

fit.title: We are selective about who we work with. That is good for both sides.
fit.subtitle: A project that is not the right fit will fail regardless of effort. We prefer to say it early.
fit.yesTitle: We are a great fit if
fit.noTitle: We are probably not your firm if

yes.1: You have a defined technology need with business impact.
yes.2: You value quality and speed over lowest price.
yes.3: A CEO or Founder owns the decision.
yes.4: You expect strategic pushback when needed.
yes.5: You need a long-term technology partner, not temporary hands.

no.1: You are choosing on price alone.
no.2: Scope is unclear and ownership is missing.
no.3: You only want coding execution without strategy.
no.4: You expect enterprise outcomes in a few days.
no.5: You already decided everything and only need labor.

cta.title:
Bring the idea.
We’ll get it moving.
cta.subtitle: Discovery is free. No pitch. No commitment. Just a conversation about what you need.

stack.title: One team. Any stack.
stack.subtitle: Bring your codebase, your language, your framework. We adapt to your technical decisions, not the other way around.

solutions.title:
End to end.
No handoffs,
no gaps.
solutions.subtitle: Six disciplines, one team. We cover every layer so you never have to manage the gaps between them.

cta.headline: Tell us what you're building.
cta.sub: We'll map the stack, size the scope, and tell you exactly what it takes: technology, timeline, and budget. One team, six disciplines, zero handoffs.

web.title: Web Development
web.body: Fast, conversion-ready web products. Engineered to perform, not just to impress.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.body: Cross-platform apps that feel native — built around your users' workflows, not ours.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.body: Intelligence embedded where it creates real leverage. Not bolted on, built in.

design.title: UX / UI Design
design.body: Interfaces that disappear. Your users focus on what they're doing, not on figuring it out.

iot.title: IoT Development
iot.body: Connected hardware, intelligent software. Systems that generate decisions, not just data.

custom.title: Custom Software
custom.body: Purpose-built when off-the-shelf is the wrong trade-off. Your workflow, not ours.
